notes: Playwright unavailable — static analysis performed instead per testing/RUN.md fallback. Critical finding: iteration 73 code changes (comment-panel.tsx, perspectives hex validation, canvas-view.tsx + journey-canvas-view.tsx integration) are NOT present in the working tree at HEAD 8b7c607. BUILD_RESULT files claim success but source files do not exist on disk. Worktrees were cleaned up before merge completed. POST_MERGE_CHECK.txt says PASS but this reflects the unchanged baseline, not the iter-73 changes. Regression suite evaluated against baseline code — no pre-existing regressions found in code that is present.

criteria_results.criterion: R01 — Auth: /login page renders
criteria_results.evidence: middleware.ts auth guard present, login route exists at src/app/(auth)/login/. No structural changes to auth in HEAD.

criteria_results.criterion: R02 — Workspace list loads when logged in
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/workspaces/route.ts GET handler intact. Joins org memberships → returns workspaces with org name. apiFetch wrappers in client.ts confirmed (fetchWorkspaces, fetchWorkspace, createWorkspace). No changes to these files.

criteria_results.criterion: R03 — Workspace canvas tab loads with nodes
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx (200 lines) verified intact. FlowCanvas, StepDetailPanel, SectionDetailPanel, WorkspaceSummaryPanel, AnnotationPanel all imported and conditionally rendered correctly. State management for sections/steps/connections/selectedIds all correct.

criteria_results.criterion: R04 — Click step node → detail panel opens
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx: handleStepSelect sets selectedStepId, selectedStep computed by .find(). StepDetailPanel rendered when selectedStep is truthy. Logic unchanged.

criteria_results.criterion: R05 — Edit step name → saves without error
criteria_results.evidence: StepDetailPanel receives onUpdate prop. steps API (PATCH /api/v1/steps/[id]) route exists. Client wrapper updateStep present in client.ts. No changes to these files at HEAD.

criteria_results.criterion: R06 — Click section node → section detail panel opens
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx: handleSectionSelect / selectedSection logic present and correct. SectionDetailPanel rendered when selectedSection is truthy and no step selected.

criteria_results.criterion: R07 — Canvas zoom/pan works
criteria_results.evidence: FlowCanvas uses @xyflow/react 12.x with fitView prop. No changes to flow-canvas.tsx or canvas interactions at HEAD. Static analysis only.

criteria_results.criterion: R08 — Journey tab: journey canvas renders
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx (618 lines) verified intact. ReactFlow with stage/touchpoint nodeTypes, initialNodes/initialEdges built from DB state, empty state overlay present. No regressions from HEAD commits.

criteria_results.criterion: R09 — Journey: click touchpoint → detail panel opens
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx: handleNodeClick identifies tp- prefix, sets selectedTouchpointId. TouchpointDetailPanel rendered when selectedTouchpoint is truthy and no stage selected.

criteria_results.criterion: R10 — Journey: click stage → stage detail panel opens
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx: handleNodeClick identifies stage- prefix, sets selectedStageId. StageDetailPanel rendered when selectedStage is truthy.

criteria_results.criterion: R11 — Step list view: data displays
criteria_results.evidence: steps API GET endpoint exists, list route at src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/list/ confirmed via directory listing. Static only.

criteria_results.criterion: R12 — Gap analysis view: maturity gaps shown
criteria_results.evidence: gap-analysis route exists. maturity_score and target_maturity fields present on Step type in database.ts. Static only.

criteria_results.criterion: R13 — Comparison view: side-by-side renders
criteria_results.evidence: compare route present in app structure. Static only.

criteria_results.criterion: R14 — Workspace settings: page loads
criteria_results.evidence: settings route exists. No changes to settings at HEAD.

criteria_results.criterion: R15 — Teams page: teams/roles display
criteria_results.evidence: teams API routes present. Team, Role, Person interfaces in database.ts. Known: teams page is a stub per testing/apps/stride.md.

criteria_results.criterion: R16 — Perspectives in settings: list displays
criteria_results.evidence: GET /api/v1/perspectives route intact. Perspective type defined. Client wrappers fetchPerspectives, createPerspective, updatePerspective, deletePerspective confirmed present in client.ts.

criteria_results.criterion: R17 — PDF export: triggers without error
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx: useCanvasExport hook used, handleExportPdf passed to FlowCanvas. journey-canvas-view.tsx: handleExportPdf with dynamic import of exportJourneyPdf. Static only.

criteria_results.criterion: R18 — PNG export: triggers without error
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx: handleExportPng via useCanvasExport. journey-canvas-view.tsx: PngExportButton component with dynamic import of exportCanvasPng. Static only.

criteria_results.criterion: R19 — No new console errors in __testErrors
criteria_results.evidence: Playwright unavailable — cannot inject mega listener. TypeScript compilation at HEAD reports 0 errors (POST_MERGE_CHECK.txt: RESULT: PASS). 5 pre-existing lint warnings (flow-canvas.tsx, sidebar.tsx, journey-canvas-view.tsx) are unchanged and expected.

criteria_results.criterion: Comments API routes present and correct from FEAT-045 [1/3] (iter 71)
criteria_results.evidence: GET and POST /api/v1/comments exist and reviewed. Validation guards present: VALID_COMMENTABLE_TYPES, VALID_CATEGORIES, content required, workspace_id required. PATCH and DELETE /api/v1/comments/[id] directory confirmed. Comment type in database.ts matches API. fetchComments/createComment/updateComment/deleteComment client wrappers at lines 513-554 of client.ts.

criteria_results.criterion: FEAT-045 [2/3]: comment-panel.tsx exists at src/components/panels/
criteria_results.evidence: File does NOT exist on disk. Directory listing of src/components/panels/ confirms absence. BUILD_RESULT_1.json claims created with 287 lines but file is missing from working tree.

criteria_results.criterion: FEAT-045 [2/3]: canvas-view.tsx has CommentPanel integration
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx read in full (200 lines). No CommentPanel import or JSX usage found. BUILD_RESULT_1.json claims 7 lines added but changes are absent.

criteria_results.criterion: FEAT-045 [2/3]: journey-canvas-view.tsx has CommentPanel integration
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx read in full (618 lines). No CommentPanel import or JSX usage found. BUILD_RESULT_1.json claims 7 lines added but changes are absent.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-001: POST /api/v1/perspectives validates hex color format
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/perspectives/route.ts read — no HEX_COLOR_REGEX constant, no color validation guard. INSERT proceeds with any color value. BUILD_RESULT_2.json claims 5 lines added but changes are absent.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-001: PATCH /api/v1/perspectives/[id] validates hex color format
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/perspectives/[id]/route.ts read — no HEX_COLOR_REGEX constant, no color validation guard in PATCH handler. BUILD_RESULT_2.json claims 6 lines added but changes are absent.

quality_gate.note: All metrics are static-analysis estimates only. Playwright unavailable — actual browser metrics not collected.

bugs_found.description: Iteration 73 builder code changes NOT applied to working branch. comment-panel.tsx does not exist, canvas-view.tsx and journey-canvas-view.tsx have no CommentPanel integration, perspectives API routes have no HEX_COLOR_REGEX validation. BUILD_RESULT_1.json and BUILD_RESULT_2.json claim success but source files are absent from disk and git history shows no new commits since 8b7c607 (the pre-iteration-73 commit).
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Check HEAD: git log --oneline shows 8b7c607 as latest commit. 2. ls src/components/panels/ — comment-panel.tsx absent. 3. grep HEX_COLOR_REGEX src/app/api/v1/perspectives/route.ts — no match. 4. git worktree list — only main worktree present. Conclusion: builder worktrees were cleaned up before merge was finalized.

bugs_found.description: POST /api/v1/perspectives and PATCH /api/v1/perspectives/[id] accept any string as the `color` field with no format validation. Invalid values like 'red', '#GGG', or SQL injection strings pass through to the database. This was the target of IMP-001 which was not applied.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. POST /api/v1/perspectives with body {workspace_id: '<id>', name: 'Test', color: 'not-a-hex'}. 2. Returns 201 — invalid color accepted.

improvements_found.observation: AnnotationPanel is gated on activePerspective — disappears when no perspective is active. CommentPanel (when it exists) is designed to always show. This asymmetry could confuse users: comments are always visible but annotations only appear when a perspective is selected. A tooltip or empty state explaining the difference would reduce confusion.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — surface the distinction between annotations (perspective-scoped) and comments (always visible) so users understand when each feature is active.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a subtle badge or label on the AnnotationPanel area when no perspective is active ('Select a perspective to add annotations') rather than hiding it entirely.

improvements_found.observation: Key shortcuts 's' for new stage and 'n' for new touchpoint are registered globally in journey-canvas-view but not documented anywhere in the UI. Users who discover these by accident get unexpected behavior; users who don't know them miss efficiency.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H7: Flexibility and efficiency of use — shortcuts accelerate expert users but must be discoverable.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a keyboard shortcut legend to the journey toolbar or as a tooltip on the Touchpoint/Stage buttons.
